title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1015 - Fee charged by licensing authority for administrative costs permitted
text:
454.1015.  Fee charged by licensing authority for administrative costs permitted. — A licensing authority may charge the obligor a reasonable fee for the administrative costs incurred by such licensing authority in taking action against the obligor's license pursuant to sections 454.1000 to 454.1025.
(L. 1997 S.B. 361) 
Effective 7-01-97
